rows.label: qev011501_MSG0001
rows.name:
Flunked again... Ahhhh!
Walter-kyoukan! Do you have
some kind of grudge against me?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0002
rows.name:
...What is it? I'm incredibly
irritated right now, so if you say
something weird, I'll bite you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev011501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask her what exactly happened.

rows.label: qev011501_JNK0020
rows.name: Provoke

rows.label: qev011501_SEL0021
rows.name: Dare to say something weird to see her reaction.

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0003
rows.name:
Oh, you'll listen to me? I was just
looking for someone to complain to~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0004
rows.name:
Ahhh! Hmph! Everyone's
making a fool out of me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0005
rows.name:
I'll seriously bite you!
Now! Don't move from there—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Actually, you look kind
of dirty, so I'll pass.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0007
rows.name:
I won't bite you, but in exchange,
listen to my complaints![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0008
rows.name:
I'm working as a mechanic right
now, but I submitted a request
to transfer to BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0009
rows.name:
And yet this instructor named Walter
keeps failing me on the aptitude tests![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0010
rows.name:
He says I'm inexperienced with weapons, or that
I lack the mental preparedness of a BLADE...
This is the 45th time already, you know?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0011
rows.name:
I've been studying every single day,
grudge-studying even when I'm in the
bathroom! This is just unbelievable, right?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_JNK0030
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev011501_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask her why she wants to become a BLADE so badly.

rows.label: qev011501_JNK0040
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: qev011501_SEL0041
rows.name: Advise her to give up since she doesn't seem suited for it.

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0012
rows.name: Good question! You're a great listener!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0013
rows.name:
So cruel! You're a demon on par with
Walter-kyoukan. But my spirit won't break![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0014
rows.name:
With the survival of Earthlings on
the line right now, I hate the idea
of sitting still in a safe place—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0015
rows.name: —That's just my official excuse, though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0016
rows.name:
Beyond the walls of NLA is a world
stretching out full of sights we could
never experience on Earth, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0017
rows.name:
My sense of adventure is tingling! I
want to see completely new landscapes
that no one has ever reached before![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0018
rows.name:
But Walter-kyoukan is tying
me down to this city! What
do you think I should do?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_JNK0050
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: qev011501_SEL0051
rows.name: Suggest she try slipping out of NLA on her own.

rows.label: qev011501_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev011501_SEL0061
rows.name: Try to make her give up since she isn't suited for it.

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Ooh, what a brilliant
idea! You're so sharp![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0020
rows.name:
To think there was a
Walter-kyoukan here too—!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0021
rows.name:
Ugh... If it comes to this— I'll just
sneak out of this city all by myself![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0022
rows.name:
Alright, I've decided! I'm heading out
right away! No one can stop my passion![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0023
rows.name:
...But relying on this equipment
to go outside is a bit too risky—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0024
rows.name:
Could you bring me a weapon and
an Inner suit? Now that you know
my plan, you're my accomplice![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0025
rows.name:
Yay! I'm glad you're
someone who understands![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0026
rows.name:
Please bring me an Iron Blade for a weapon,
and a Battle Body for an Inner suit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0027
rows.name:
If I'm equipped with at least
that much, I'll be fine even if
native creatures show up, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0028
rows.name:
I'm counting on you! Do it before
I end up burnt to a crisp by my
burning sense of adventure![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0034
rows.name:
Please bring me the Iron
Blade and Battle Body![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011501_MSG0035
rows.name:
Before I end up burnt to a crisp by
my burning sense of adventure, hurry
up and bring them to me right now![ST:wait ]
